title: Enhanced Budget 2026 Cost-of-Living Special Payment
text:
Enhanced Budget 2026 Cost-of-Living Special Payment - SupportGoWhere
Enhanced Budget 2026 Cost-of-Living Special Payment
Share link
$400 to $600 cash payout for eligible Singaporean adults.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$400 to $600 cash payout for eligible Singaporean adults
Payouts will be disbursed in September 2026
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Cash payout of $400 to $600 for eligible Singaporean adults

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore

Aged 21 and above in 2026

Assessable Income for Year of Assessment 2025 must not exceed $100,000

Tiered by Annual Value of Place of Residence (as indicated on NRIC) as at 31 December 2025

Does not own more than 1 property




How to apply?

No application needed

Where can I find help?

View more details 

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Contact us

Scheme last updated 29 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
